title: Evaluation Monitor Record
description: Single-ingestion monitoring record derived from one regression_run_result artifact. Produced by the BS Continuous Evaluation Monitor.

monitor_record_id.description: Unique identifier for this monitor record.

source_run_id.description: run_id of the regression_run_result that was ingested.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when this monitor record was created.

total_traces.description: Total number of traces in the source run.

passed_traces.description: Number of traces that passed in the source run.

failed_traces.description: Number of traces that failed in the source run.

pass_rate.description: Fraction of traces that passed: passed_traces / total_traces.

average_reproducibility_score.description: Mean reproducibility score across all traces in the source run.

drift_counts.description: Count of each drift type observed across all traces.

overall_status.description: Overall status from the source regression run.

sli_snapshot.description: Artifact-oriented SLI snapshot computed from the source run.

regression_pass_rate.description: Fraction of traces that passed all regression criteria.

average_reproducibility_score.description: Mean reproducibility score across all traces.

replay_status.description: Decision integrity status from the replay_decision_analysis artifact.

alert_recommendation.description: Alert recommendation computed from policy rules.

reasons.description: Human-readable reasons for this alert level.

schema_version.description: Version of the evaluation_monitor_record schema used.

generator.description: Identifier of the module or script that generated this record.
